summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Cat House marketing website. All major sections tested including hero, brands marquee, about, services, reviews, gallery, location (Google Maps), contact form, WhatsApp button, footer, and mobile responsiveness.

issues: Hamburger menu icon visible on mobile (expected), but nav links hidden behind menu - acceptable behavior

critical_code_review_comments: No data-testid attributes on interactive elements (inputs, buttons) - would improve testability
Contact form inputs use unusual placeholder patterns ('e.g. Ahmed Abdullah') making CSS attribute selectors harder
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: Hero (title/CTA/rating), Navbar (logo+links+Call Us), Brands marquee (Royal Canin, Hills, Brit visible), About (stats cards visible), Services (4 cards with images), Reviews (4 cards with 5-star ratings), Gallery (9 images in grid), Location (Google Maps iframe embedded), Contact form (fills + shows 'Message Sent!' success state - MOCKED frontend only), WhatsApp button (links to correct https://wa.me/966595227853), Footer (logo, nav links, address, phone, copyright). Mobile 390px tested - responsive with hamburger menu.
